opinion.p: 559 U. S. ____ (2010) 559 U. S. ____ (2010) 559 U. S. ____ (2010) SUPREME COURT OF THE UNITED STATES NO. 07-11191 MARK A. BRISCOE and SHELDON A. CYPRESS, PETITIONERS v. VIRGINIA
on writ of certiorari to the supreme court of virginia
We vacate the judgment of the Supreme Court of Virginia and remand the case for further proceedings not inconsistent with the opinion in Melendez-Diaz v. Massachusetts, 557 U. S. ___ (2009).
